title: hybrid_search MCP Tool
impact: Exposes three-layer hybrid search via MCP protocol for AI assistants to use

toolAvailability.target: Unified hybrid_search tool with weight configuration

tasks.title: Add hybrid_search Tool Definition
tasks.description: Add the hybrid_search tool definition to the MCP server's toolDefinitions.ts with full parameter schema.

implementation.purpose: Define the MCP tool schema for hybrid_search so that AI assistants can invoke it with proper parameters.
keyDecisions: Query is the only required parameter
Weights default to semantic=0.5, lexical=0.3, symbolic=0.2
Filters support tags, entityTypes, dateRange, importance
Response includes per-layer scores for transparency
implementation.existingCodeContext: toolDefinitions.ts contains all 55 existing tool definitions organized by category. Add hybrid_search to the Search category.

stepByStep.details: Search for 'search_nodes' or 'Search' category comment to locate where search tools are defined

stepByStep.action: Add hybrid_search tool definition after existing search tools

acceptanceCriteria: hybrid_search tool definition added to toolDefinitions.ts
Weights object has semantic, lexical, symbolic properties with defaults
Filters object supports tags, entityTypes, dateRange, importance

tasks.title: Implement hybrid_search Handler
tasks.description: Implement the handler for hybrid_search tool in toolHandlers.ts that invokes HybridSearchManager.

implementation.purpose: Wire up the MCP tool to the HybridSearchManager class and format the response with per-layer scores.
keyDecisions: Create HybridSearchManager with context's semantic and ranked search instances
Transform filters parameter to SymbolicFilters format
Response includes scores, matchedLayers, and truncated observations
implementation.existingCodeContext: toolHandlers.ts contains handler functions for all tools. ctx provides access to managers and storage.

stepByStep.action: Add import for HybridSearchManager at the top
Find the switch statement for tool handling
stepByStep.details: Search for 'switch' or 'case' to find the tool handler dispatch

stepByStep.action: Add the case handler for hybrid_search

acceptanceCriteria: Response includes query, weights, resultCount, and results array
Each result includes scores, matchedLayers, truncated observations

tasks.title: Update Search Barrel Exports
tasks.description: Export new search classes from the search module barrel file.

implementation.purpose: Make SymbolicSearch and HybridSearchManager available via the public API.

stepByStep.details: Open the search barrel export file

stepByStep.action: Add exports for new search classes at the end

tasks.title: Create Integration Tests for hybrid_search
tasks.description: Create integration tests for the hybrid_search MCP tool with real entity data.

implementation.purpose: Verify the hybrid_search tool works end-to-end with real storage and search operations.

stepByStep.action: Add tests for hybrid search functionality
stepByStep.details: Add tests covering basic search, weight customization, filter application, and response structure

successCriteria: All four tasks completed with passing tests
hybrid_search tool available via MCP protocol
Tool accepts query, weights, filters, limit parameters
Response includes per-layer scores and matchedLayers
New classes exported from search barrel
notes: CRITICAL: Handler must instantiate HybridSearchManager with context's existing search managers
Response should include enough information for debugging (per-layer scores)
Observations are truncated to first 3 to keep response size reasonable
This sprint completes the hybrid_search feature for use by AI assistants
